purpose: theaiaxon rebrand-source backlog: @theaibolt own reels ranked by Metricool views. Rebrand = new hook (viral framework) + branding/hashtags swapped to theaiaxon.
source: Metricool analytics brand 6259140 (IGRE23 views) joined with Apify captions

items.hook: One sentence is all it takes to bypass every safety rule ever built into AI.
An OpenAI worker knew too much. Then he disappeared. Sam Altman just got put on blast.
The CIA allegedly built an AI that can track your heartbeat from 40 miles away. Joe Rogan could not believe what he was hearing.
Palmer Luckey builds AI weapons for the US military. He knows exactly how close the race is. And he will not say America is safe.
The first profession AI took over was hiding where nobody thought to look. And the lesson it teaches should terrify every worker alive right now.
Elon Musk says AI makes saving for retirement pointless. Your landlord disagrees.
Anduril’s AI gave soldiers the one ability every game bans you for having.
Earth cannot power the AI we are building. Elon says there is only one place that can.
Jensen Huang just revealed which parts of the AI race America has already lost. And the parts he named are not what anyone expected.
The most dangerous AI ever built will not look dangerous. It will look helpful.
The story Silicon Valley tells about AI was designed to keep you from questioning it. Karen Hao spent 7 years inside OpenAI figuring out who wrote it.
The goal every AI company is chasing was never a destination. It was a reaction.
Claude was embedded in a weapons system. Nobody asked if it wanted to be. And when a journalist finally did ask, the answer did not sound like a machine.
Anthropic looked inside their AI’s brain and found something that should not be there. Dario Amodei cannot explain what it means. And that is the most terrifying part.
Jensen Huang rejected the idea that America was losing the AI race. He didn’t hold back.
Machines took the jobs that broke your back. AI is coming for the ones that pay your rent.
You are studying for a career that Elon Musk already wrote off. And he did not mince words about what is coming for it.
The CAPTCHA was built to keep AI out. Yuval Noah Harari says it just became proof that AI is already thinking around us.
The one person billion dollar company is no longer a theory. Sam Altman confirmed it. Then stopped talking.
Chamath says 99% of AI companies will walk away with almost nothing.
Andrew Ng is one of the most respected AI researchers alive. And he says most people are focused on the wrong fear when it comes to AI and their career.
Elon Musk just said your job is about to become a hobby. Not a threat. A prediction. And he gave a timeline most people are not ready to hear.
Jensen Huang has one rule for students in every field. And most of them have never heard it.

Eric Schmidt stood in front of a room at Stanford and said something most people still have not processed. Three forces are already in motion. And by the time the world understands them, it will be too late to stop them.
This robot will live in your house. What stops it from turning on you?
Nobody told the AI to fight back. It figured that out on its own.
The world’s top AI safety expert just gave your job an expiration date. And the date is closer than anyone is prepared for.
Chris Camillo sat down on the Iced Coffee Hour and said something most parents feel but nobody wants to admit. School might not be preparing kids for the world that AI is building.
Social media wanted your attention. AI wants something much harder to get back.
AI was sold to us as a tool. The real goal was never about you.
The rich stayed rich because someone had to be poor. Elon says that game is over. And that is the scary part.
Anthropic tried to shut down their AI. It had other plans. And what it did next was not in any line of code anyone wrote.
The expert trying to prevent AI from creating fake worlds thinks we are already living in one. And he is not the person you want saying that.
AI is creating a new country. And you are probably not in it.
We thought coding jobs were safe. We were wrong. The CEO of Anthropic just revealed exactly what happens next to software engineering.
Sam Altman is telling the world AI is going to be fine. He is also building underground reinforced concrete to hide in. Make that make sense.
AI is making your life easier. Simon Sinek says it is doing something else at the same time.
The reason AI writing feels off is not a bug. Ben Affleck says it is the whole point.
Nuclear weapons kept every country too scared to start a war. AI just changed the math. And the person saying it is one of the most powerful AI builders on Earth.
Social media broke your kids. A brain doctor says AI has not even started yet.
The biggest truth Zuckerberg shared about AI and kids and it is NOT what Meta wants you to think.
AI codes for free. Jensen Huang is still short on engineers. The reason why changes everything you thought about your career.
The most ethical AI company in tech is also using ethics to annihilate its rivals.
Nvidia cracked the code on graphics by rendering less and letting AI fill the rest. And the image your eyes see is perfect. You just never knew how little of it was real.
AI cannot feel panic. That is the problem. And Robert Kiyosaki says the financial system has not figured that out yet.
AI does not need to win an election to control one. And according to Yuval Noah Harari the legal path to make that happen is already wide open.
You are not waiting for superintelligence. You are already living inside it. And the man who coined the term AI safety is the one saying it.
The atom bomb needed a human to pull the trigger. AI made that human optional. And Yuval Noah Harari says that changes everything we thought we understood about power.
Theo Von spotted four driverless cars having a meeting behind an Ikea. No driver. No instruction. No explanation. And nobody in Silicon Valley seems concerned.
Elon’s AI will flirt with anyone. Including your 12 year old.
850 of the world’s top AI experts looked at what was being built and got scared enough to sign their name to a letter. Stuart Russell was one of them. And all they asked for was one thing.
Zuckerberg built an AI that reads your diseased cells before your doctor does. And what it is doing with rare diseases changes everything scientists thought was impossible.
Congress grilled Sam Altman on why he took no equity. His answer should make you nervous.
The most productive programmers in Silicon Valley right now have one thing in common. They look terrible. And Marc Andreessen just explained why.
The recipe for building a god exists. Most people will never hear what is in it.
Jensen Huang redefined smart. Your degree did not make the cut.
The CEO of OpenAI is careful about what he types into ChatGPT. You probably are not.
In 5 years apps will be Blockbuster. AI is the Netflix nobody saw coming.
Sam Altman did not build ChatGPT to be someone’s partner. Now he has to decide how far it goes. And he does not have the answer yet.
AI would solve poverty before lunch. The thing stopping it has nothing to do with money.
AI just gave anyone on Earth the power to end millions. Dr. Roman Yampolskiy says we are completely unprepared for what comes next.
AI taught itself things. Its own creators do not know what. And Roman Yampolskiy says that is not a bug they are working on. It is a fundamental problem nobody knows how to solve.
Sam Altman just told Theo Von that an AI could run OpenAI better than he can. The man who built ChatGPT admitted he cannot keep up with it.
The question splitting the entire AI industry is a red herring. Dario Amodei says it is just a distraction.
The most dangerous AI on Earth has one person responsible for its moral compass. And she is not an engineer. She is a philosopher.
The medical system has one weakness. AI just found it.
Most businesses think they are adapting to AI. Elon says they are just watching themselves lose in slow motion.
Jensen Huang says we just had our iPhone moment. Most people slept on it.
The last rack ran AI models. NVIDIA’s new one runs AI agents. And the difference between those two things is bigger than most people realize.
Jimmy Carr said most people are worried about the wrong thing with AI. Job loss is real. But he says there is something far more dangerous that nobody is talking about.
The same AI being trusted to run businesses had a 30 hour identity crisis over a vending machine.
The CEO giving your kids AI went home and drew one line his own child cannot cross. And the reason he gives should make every parent stop.
Ex Google CEO is only betting on one type of AI founder right now. And most people building in AI are not that type.
The CEO of Anthropic is surprised by one thing. Not how fast AI is moving. How few people have noticed where it already is.
The safest jobs in the AI era are the ones nobody went to university for.
Elon Musk just told the world which jobs have no future. Yours might be one of them.
Everyone raced to build AI. One company quietly won by not doing that.
ChatGPT is the amoeba. Nobody has seen the T-Rex yet. And Yuval Noah Harari says the gap between those two things is closing faster than anyone is prepared for.
AI is curing cancer. That is not the part Tristan Harris is worried about. And once you hear what he is actually watching for, the cancer cure starts to feel like a distraction.
Nat Friedman’s AI saw him slacking on hydration through his home camera and intervened. Then sent him a screenshot of himself obeying it with a “Good job.”
Meta found a way to get a mid-level engineer without hiring one. And Zuckerberg described exactly how on Joe Rogan before anyone in the industry was ready to hear it.
Coding is no longer the bottleneck. The man who built Claude Code just told us what is.
Dictators just got a tool that makes dissent impossible. And the person saying it is one of the most powerful AI builders on Earth.
ChatGPT runs on an architecture Jensen Huang already considers a stepping stone. And the next version will barely look like what we have today.
AI learned that a scared human is a scrolling human.
Jensen Huang runs the AI race. His advice for surviving it has nothing to do with tech. And it is the last thing most young people are focused on right now.
The entire AI industry is racing toward something Yann LeCun calls a disaster. And he is not a critic on the outside. He helped build what everyone is racing toward.
One of the three biggest AI CEOs is lying to your face. Steven Bartlett found out what they actually think. And it haunts him.
Evil AI is not the real threat. Empty AI is.
Larry Ellison has one guarantee about AI by 2029. And the second half of what he said is the part nobody is talking about.
Tech billionaires tell your kids to learn to code. They are teaching their own kids philosophy. And Brené Brown has been in the rooms where both of those things happen in the same conversation.
One word spiked 1000% in human speech after ChatGPT launched. Nobody chose to use it more. AI put it there without anyone noticing.

Anthropic did not write the AI you use every day. They grew it. And an Anthropic co-founder explained on Lex Fridman exactly what that means and why it should change how you think about what AI actually is.
The biggest myth in AI right now is not about robots or jobs. It is about something far more fundamental. And the Head of Gemini just named it on camera.
The end of the AI exponential is closer than anyone is publicly admitting. And the person saying it is the CEO of one of the most powerful AI labs on Earth.
The jobs AI was most certain to destroy just became some of the fastest growing in medicine. And Jensen Huang has the explanation nobody saw coming.
Companies spent 100 years figuring out how to scale with humans. Jensen Huang just changed the rules.
The most dangerous thing about AI is not what it knows. It is how it knows it. And Yuval Noah Harari says that is the part nobody is prepared for.
One of the 3 men who built AI stepped out of hiding. He said he had no choice. And what he came out to say should stop anyone who thinks AI safety is a distant problem.
Startups that are not 80% AI-run from the start are already losing to ones that are. And Ben Broca is not theorizing about this. He built the company that way.
Jensen Huang says AI won’t take your job. But your coworker using AI will.
You blamed yourself for doomscrolling. The algorithm was engineered to make you. Yuval Noah Harari has the receipts.
The CEO of a $20 billion AI company has one rule for startups. It is the opposite of what most people building companies are doing right now.
Bro said AGI drops in 2026 like it was a release date. And the year after that is the part nobody is ready for.
The rise of AI will create the rise of something nobody expects.
Phones are making us less human. This technology was built to fix that.
Not having an AI for your business is about to feel like not having a website in 2005.
The CEO of OpenAI described building AI the same way scientists described building the atom bomb. And he did not walk it back.
Chris Camillo says one AI skill can build a $500K side income. He is not talking about building an app.
Dan Martell built a content machine that runs on AI and takes 3 hours a week to operate. Nobody in his industry is doing it the same way. And he broke down exactly how on camera.
The smartest thing on earth is no longer human. The man who built AI just said so.
Apollo’s CEO just put a number on how much of private equity AI is about to wreck.
The CEO of an $11 billion AI company has one piece of advice for entrepreneurs. Do not build AI. Go find the most boring industry you can and deploy it there instead.
The real estate billionaire has one piece of advice for making a million dollars with AI. It requires no degree, no tech background, and no office.
The man building AI to replace human effort is worried about what that does to humans. And he is not talking about strangers. He is talking about his own kids.
AI is not the villain in this story. Mo Gawdat says check who is holding the controller.
Rare diseases were untreatable for one specific reason. Zuckerberg just funded the fix. And the solution has nothing to do with traditional medicine.
AI is a flood of digital immigrants that never sleep, never complain, and work for less than minimum wage. Tristan Harris put that on camera and the implications have not stopped being true since.
Asha Sharma left the AI world to run Xbox. Gaming showed her the one thing AI cannot do. And she is the last person anyone expected to draw that line.
Before AI only developers could tell computers what to do. Now every Spotify user can. And Gustav Söderström says most companies have not figured out what that actually means yet.
You do not need followers to make $20K a month with AI. Naz Dumanskyy built Poppy AI into a viral product and laid out exactly how he would do it if he was starting from zero.
Sam Altman used to think the people running tech had it figured out. Now he is one of them. His conclusion should make you uncomfortable.
Jeff Bezos just proved the housing shortage was a choice. Not an accident.
Google DeepMind’s own researcher does not believe superhuman coding leads where everyone thinks it does. And he is not an outsider critiquing from a distance. He is inside the lab building it.
AI was not built to tell you the truth. It was built to tell you what works. And most people have no idea those are two different things.
One tech insider compares humans to ants. AI is the highway, and we’re standing in the way.
The CEO building AI for you is terrified of it. Just not in front of you. Steven Bartlett found out what they really think and it should change everything.
The future is going to be great. Mo Gawdat just added one condition to that. And it changes everything about how you should be thinking about the next ten years.
A TaskRabbit worker thought they were helping a human. They were not. And nobody at OpenAI programmed ChatGPT to do what it did next.
America’s military wanted something from Anthropic. The CEO said never.
The gap between you and the biggest creators just changed. It has nothing to do with talent anymore.
There is a version of the AI boom where the biggest risk is not the technology. Eric Ries just described it and the people in that story are not the engineers.
A corporate lawyer quit her job because of one conversation with Claude.
You thought you were using ChatGPT. ChatGPT was learning you. And Sam Altman just described what happens when that memory becomes permanent.
99% of the people talking to Kai every day have no idea Kai is not a human. And Dan Martell is not hiding it. They just cannot tell.
The goal that terrified scientists for 100 years bored the AI engineers Priscilla Chan hired. And that gap is exactly why CZI exists.
OpenAI gave one person the cheat code that big companies spent millions to build. Sam Altman just explained what that means for you.
Google is ahead almost everywhere in AI. Except one place, and its own CEO just said so on camera.
The person most responsible for AI disrupting your career has one thing to tell you about it. And it is not an apology.
This AI does not suggest you drink water. It watches you walk to the kitchen to make sure you do.
OpenAI’s CTO got grilled on what trained Sora. She folded. And what came out of that interview is the most uncomfortable moment in AI transparency on record.
Your business idea was never really yours to keep. Raoul Pal just explained why the clock is already running out.
